title: Four Hundred a File or Twenty-Nine a Month
description: Texas transaction coordinators charge $300 to $400 per file. Dossie is $29 a month for unlimited deals. The math is brutal.
voiceover_script: Texas transaction coordinators charge three to four hundred dollars a file. Close ten files a year, that's four thousand dollars. Close thirty, you just spent twelve thousand. Dossie is twenty nine dollars a month. Unlimited deals. Same Morning Brief, same TREC deadlines, same follow-ups. The math is brutal. The choice is yours.
